network_summaries.summary: Sameera Hussain is the founder and president of Dental Dreams LLC, a multi-state family-owned DSO launched in 2001 in Aurora, IL and now operating 65+ locations across 11+ states. Her husband Khurram Hussain is sole member/CEO of KOS Services LLC, the MSO that handles all administrative and business operations for Dental Dreams. In NPPES, these offices are registered under three legal entity names: "Dental Experts, LLC" (the primary friendly-PC entity used across most IL locations, with parent_company=KOS SERVICES in the DB), "Dental Dreams, LLC" (used for the Erie St location and the Fullerton Ave location), and "The Dental Clinic, LLC" (63rd St, affiliated_dso=Dental Dreams in DB). All 10 cluster locations have been confirmed against the dentaldreams.com public locator (Melrose Park/West North Ave, Chicago Heights/14th St, Joliet/Larkin Ave, Chicago/West Cermak Rd, Chicago/West Fullerton Ave, Chicago/Cicero Ave all return exact address matches). No private equity investment in Dental Dreams was found in any search; all evidence points to continued Hussain family ownership with KOS Services as the MSO layer. All 10 locations are already classified dso_national in the pipeline DB, which is consistent with this finding. Sameera Hussain's role as AO across these NPIs reflects her position as founder/owner-dentist and licensed principal of the professional entities, not a credentialing admin — this is genuine ownership-level reach. pe_backed=false per all available evidence.

DENTAL TOWN LTD / Dental Town Chicago is a dentist-founded, dentist-led multi-location private group operating 12 offices across Chicagoland under the public brand "Dental Town Chicago" (dentaltownchicago.com). Founder and President is Dr. Sinan Razzak (DDS), who built the group organically. Samantha Gonzalez is VP of Operations — an administrative authorized official across the NPIs, not the owner-dentist. No PE, MSO, DSO-management, or acquisition evidence found across three web searches. All 9 watched cluster locations are confirmed on the official multi-location website with matching addresses and phone numbers. This is a dentist_multi network, ready_for_validation on the strength of the official branded website and named founder identity.

All 7 locations in the CELIA HAYES AO cluster operate under Heartland Dental friendly-PC legal entities in Illinois — "TRU DENTAL ILLINOIS, P.C." (6 locations) and "DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C." (1 location). Heartland Dental is the nation's largest DSO, majority-owned by KKR (PE-backed since 2018). The Tru Dental Illinois offices are the result of Heartland's December 2020 acquisition of Tru Family Dental, announced publicly via PR Newswire. All 6 Heartland-affiliated locations were already classified dso_national in the database. The Elmwood Park (60707) location shows parent_company=SONRAVA HEALTH in the federal data but carries the same TRU DENTAL ILLINOIS P.C. entity name as the other Heartland locations — flagged as a potential data artifact; classified branded_dso/Heartland pending field verification. CELIA HAYES functions as an authorized official/administrator for these Heartland-supported friendly-PC entities, not as a private dentist-owner.

Alan J. Acierno DDS is the Founder, Owner, and CEO of DecisionOne Dental Partners — a Schaumburg-IL-based DSO/MSO that received a documented strategic investment from Smile Brands Inc. (a PE-backed national DSO). All 6 locations in this AO cluster are affiliated with DecisionOne Dental Partners, operating under local trade names (Village Smiles LLC, Second Street Dental LLC, Route 64 Dental LLC, Alan J Acierno PC, Higgins Family Dental, PPD North Avenue LLC). The office at 129 S Roselle Rd Schaumburg matches DecisionOne's published Schaumburg location. Elk Grove Village, St. Charles (×2), and Elmwood Park also match DecisionOne's published IL location list. Two locations are already tagged dso_regional with affiliated_dso="Park Place Dental Group (multi-brand)" — "PPD" in PPD North Avenue LLC likely stands for Park Place Dental, a brand used within the DecisionOne network. This is a stealth/friendly-name MSO structure, not a solo dentist multi-office group.

Dr. Milad Nourahmadi (DDS, University of Illinois) is the dentist-owner of a privately held 6-location Chicagoland dental group operating primarily under the "Shining Smiles" brand (shiningsmiles.com) with the Chicago/Western Ave location branded as "Novera Oral Health Studio." Each location is incorporated as a separate friendly-PC entity (SHINING SMILES FRANKLIN PARK INC, SHINING SMILES 4 INC, SHINING SMILES LLC, SHINING SMILES RIVERSIDE INC, SHINING SMILES PLAINFIELD INC, SHINY SMILES INC) but operated under common ownership by Dr. Nourahmadi. The official group website lists Bolingbrook, Joliet, Franklin Park, Riverside, and Plainfield as Shining Smiles offices; NPI records confirm the Chicago/Western Ave entity (SHINY SMILES INC, NPI 1063785806) is registered at that address as Novera Oral Health Studio. No PE, MSO, or DSO management evidence was found on any source. This is a dentist-owned multi-location private group — dentist_multi, pe_backed=false.

Dr. Christos (Chris) Tsaliagos, DDS is a licensed dentist and founder/president of the MetroSmiles multi-location dental group, which he started in 1994. He is listed as President on BBB profiles for MetroSmiles Brickyard and MetroSmiles Pilsen (both incorporated 12/23/2013). The official website metrosmilesdental.com shows 7 Chicagoland locations operating under the MetroSmiles brand. No PE, MSO, or DSO management evidence was found. Four of the six AO cluster locations carry the "METROSMILES" brand name directly; Brickyard Dental Center (60639) is confirmed as Tsaliagos's practice on Healthgrades; Cicero Dental Inc (60463) and The Toothpatrol P.C. (60652) are structurally linked via shared AO but less directly branded. This is a dentist-owned, privately-operated multi-location group with no corporate/PE backing identified.

Jay Jorbin is the CFO of Bright Direction Dental (BDD), a PE-backed Midwest DSO headquartered in Elmhurst, IL. "BDD" in the NPI entity names (BDD of Illinois P.C., BDD AFDS PC, BDD JHG PC) stands for Bright Direction Dental. BDD explicitly self-identifies as a DSO, supports 40+ Midwest practices, and is backed by private equity investor PNC Mezzanine Capital (acquired 2024); Northwest Sponsor Finance confirmed PE backing in a financing announcement. These 5 Chicagoland IL locations operate as friendly professional corporation (PC) vehicles under the BDD DSO management umbrella — a textbook stealth_dso structure with local PC names concealing the PE-backed DSO behind them. Jay Jorbin appears as the authorized official across all 5 NPIs in his capacity as CFO of the management entity, not as a dentist-owner.

Jason Korkus, DDS (University of Michigan 1999) is the founder and President of the Sonrisa Family Dental group, a dentist-owned multi-location practice network serving largely Hispanic communities across Chicagoland. His official bio on sonrisafamilydental.com confirms founder/owner status. The Sonrisa Group page lists the network's locations. No PE, MSO, or DSO-management evidence was found — Crunchbase shows zero funding rounds and no investor disclosures. The network is a private dentist-owned group operating under a unified public brand. One location (60623) carries a 'CAPITATION ESPERANZA' professional corporation name reflecting a capitation/Medicaid billing arrangement with a community health center partner (CDCA/Access Community Health), not PE management. All 5 locations share the AO Jason Korkus and the Sonrisa brand.

RAJAN SHARMA is a board-eligible endodontist (DDS, MSD, taxonomy 1223E0200X) operating under two local brand names — "The Dental Specialists" and "Implant Solutions" — across 5 Chicagoland locations (Skokie, Homewood, Westmont, and two Chicago ZIPs). Web evidence confirms Dr. Sharma is an endodontist, not a GP owner; the practice names are specialist-named by design. This network is specialist-dominant and must be excluded from the GP denominator. No PE/MSO/DSO management evidence was found. owner_type_verdict is left unresolved because the specialist-exclusion rule makes GP-tier assignment inappropriate.

Milan Roncevic appears as authorized official (AO) on 5 Chicagoland GP locations across ZIPs 60101, 60120, 60630, 60634, 60647. Web research identifies him as a non-clinical executive (CEO title at 'Dental Profile' per LinkedIn; CEO at 'The Chicago Tooth Fairy' per ZoomInfo, email @chicagotoothfairy.com). No DDS/DMD credential was found — he does not appear to be a licensed dentist. One location (DENTAL PROFILE 2, Addison 60101) is already classified dso_regional with affiliated_dso='1st Family Dental' in the DB; the 1st Family Dental website confirms a location at 120 E Lake St Addison and lists Dr. Ghassan Abboud as President. The remaining four locations operate under heterogeneous local names (ELGIN DENTAL PROFILE LTD., A K A DENTAL, AYA DENTAL, DENTAL PROFILE), with 'Dental Profile' appearing as a thread across at least three of them. No shared public website, PE/MSO sponsor, or management-services documentation was found for the four non-1FD locations. The non-dentist CEO-as-AO pattern across multiple local-name practices is a moderate signal for a management company or stealth DSO arrangement, but documentary PE/MSO/MSA evidence is absent. Gate status is candidate across all rows; the Addison location's existing dso_regional classification is corroborated by 1st Family Dental's public locator.

Dr. David Rubis, DDS, was the principal owner of Advanced Family Dental who affiliated his multi-location Chicagoland group with Great Lakes Dental Partners (GLDP) in June 2018, becoming GLDP's General Dentist and Senior Clinical Advisor. GLDP is an active Shore Capital Partners (PE) portfolio company, confirmed on Shore Capital's own website (shorecp.com/companies/great-lakes-dental-partners). All 5 locations share David Rubis as NPPES Authorized Official; 3 already carry affiliated_dso='Great Lakes Dental Partners' or parent_company='SHORE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC' in the federal data. The network operates under local friendly-PC names (Advanced Family Dental, Avid Dental, Dental Roots, Montrose Dental Clinic) — classic stealth_dso pattern. Avid Dental Joliet appears closed per Yelp (June 2026). Montrose Dental Clinic Chicago is confirmed under David Rubis as President but lacks explicit GLDP branding in current web results; the AO tie and GLDP network affiliation are strong structural signals pointing to the same MSO umbrella.

Pradeep Khurana, DDS is a confirmed dentist and co-owner/co-founder of Valley View Dental Illinois, which he co-founded with Dr. Paul Singh in October 1999. The official multi-location website vvdental.com documents 3 operating offices (Romeoville, Naperville, Montgomery). Two of the five NPPES locations carry the "Valley View Dental Group LLC" entity name and match vvdental.com addresses exactly (Romeoville 441 N Weber Rd, Montgomery 1078 Ogden Ave). A third "Valley View Dental Group LLC" NPI appears at 62b Ogden Ave, Downers Grove 60515 with the same Montgomery phone (630-923-0900) — likely a satellite or billing variant. The two "Sparkle Dental Group LLC" NPIs (Lemont 15543 E 127th St, Downers Grove 4121 Fairview Ave) share Khurana as NPPES authorized official but those addresses currently operate as "Dentique Dental" (formerly "Elite Dental Care"), associated with a different dentist in review/directory listings; Khurana's AO registration on those NPIs may reflect legal LLC ownership or historical credentialing. No private equity, MSO, or DSO management evidence found across any source. This is a dentist-owned private multi-location group, not a PE-backed or managed DSO.

Dr. Phillip Palella (DDS, UIC 2004) owns and operates a private 3-to-4 location general dentistry group in Chicago operating as "Modern Dental Chicago" (moderndentalchicago.com). His website explicitly states the practice is "individually owned and operated by Dr. Phillip Palella" and "independently owned" — explicitly not corporate. He opened Modern Dental on Division in the Wicker Park neighborhood over 15 years ago and expanded to Logan Square, Clark Street, and Sheffield. One additional NPI record ("Halo Dental," NPI 1447663232) is registered at the identical address and phone as Modern Dental on Division (2033 W Division St, 60622) — likely a same-office org-NPI or former name, not a distinct location. No PE, MSO, or DSO-management evidence found anywhere in the public record.

Dr. Randy Chang, DDS is a licensed Illinois dentist (DDS from University of Tennessee Health Science Center, 2001) who personally owns and operates 8 dental clinics in the Chicago area, operating under two legal brands: Precision Dental Care, LLC and Advantage Dental Care, LLC. He opened his first clinic in 2004 and co-opened 4 Precision Dental Care offices starting 2007. The official group website precisiondentalchicago.com has both a "Meet the Doctors" bio page and an "Our Locations" page confirming multi-location private ownership. ADA directory and Yelp listings independently confirm Dr. Chang as owner at the Advantage Dental Care address (7300 N Western Ave). No PE/MSO/DSO-management or franchise evidence found — this is a dentist-owned private group with no private equity backing.
